mapper.select: SELECT corp_name, kok_idx, subscription_start_date, subscription_end_date, listing_date, offering_price, accounts FROM ipo_checklist ORDER BY subscription_start_date DESC
SELECT corp_name, kok_idx, subscription_start_date, subscription_end_date, listing_date, offering_price, accounts FROM ipo_checklist WHERE corp_name = #{corpName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ipo_checklist (corp_name, kok_idx, subscription_start_date, subscription_end_date, listing_date, offering_price, accounts) VALUES (#{corpName}, #{kokIdx}, #{subscriptionStartDate}, #{subscriptionEndDate}, #{listingDate}, #{offeringPrice}, #{accounts}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE kok_idx = VALUES(kok_idx), subscription_start_date = VALUES(subscription_start_date), subscription_end_date = VALUES(subscription_end_date), listing_date = VALUES(listing_date), offering_price = VALUES(offering_price), accounts = VALUES(accounts)
